[[File:Bookshelf.jpg|frameless|left]]
===1. Ranking Boards===
Every 3 days, the rankings refresh and you get 15K B-tads. Found on floor by Robot Guard.<br>Not cross server.

===2. Book Sharing===
This allows weekly and monthly sharing for rewards.

Weekly sharing can be activated by buying {{RewardIconWithLink|Top Books|green}} from the [[Museum Shop]].

===3. Art of Trade===
When you reach the required Power amount you can invest W-tads and instantly get them back plus more.

===4. Home Manual===
Was bugged, and then moved to the Mailbox.<br>
Explore Home to unlock hidden features.<br>Complete tasks to get rewards.

===5. Game Tips===
Guides, tips, and tricks to help you in the game. There are Snail Codes exclusive to you on every page.

{{clear}}
==Game Tips==
For those of you who won't read the tips in game, here they are! ''*Snail Codes not included''

===Getting Stronger===
<span style="color:#0000FF">After the tutorial, collect these Relics at Home:</span><br>
# [[Mutant Fungus]] in the Fungus Farm
# [[Gold Toilet Paper]] on the Fridge
# [[Golden Finger]] at the entrance to the [[Garage]]
# Talk to the [[Robot Guard]] to get the [[Nuclear Fusion Battery]]

<span style="color:#0000FF">Recommended evolution order:</span><br>
Organs>ATK>DEF>RUSH>HP>Others<br>You can unlock Gene Form Evolution after reaching max level!<br><span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(Upgrade Combat Stats first to make the game easier)</span>

<span style="color:#0000FF">Snail Form Choice:</span><br>
# Demon Form has high ATK and DEF and can collect souls
# Always use Dragon Form after you obtain it as it has the highest stats
# Use Mutant Form for auto-play to collect Time Chests

<span style="color:#0000FF">Tips for embedding Relics:</span><br>
# Recommended order: Compass>Home Facility>Biozilla>Museum
# Make 2 Compass presets: one for battle and the other for exploring
# Pay attention to Embed Perks<br>
<span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(T3+ Relics have them)</span>

<span style="color:#0000FF">Techniques for Exploration:</span>
# Generally, the first page of the INTEL Tree boosts resource gain while the second page boosts stats
# Prioritize perks related to areas. The further you explore, the more you get
# Redeem perks related to combat stats before fighting Apostles
# You don't have to dominate the Apostles. Exploration is more important.<br>
<span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(If you can't dominate an Apostle, consider exploring the next Realm for buffs)</span>

<span style="color:#0000FF">Tips for Stats Increase:</span>
# Exploration Speed>Offering Speed>Research Speed>Refinement Speed
# HARD stats (HP, ATK, RUSH, DEF)>minion stats>AFFCT stats (ART, FTH, FAME, CIV, TECH)
# Before entering Murika, equally boost HARD stats and minion stats
# Partners: upgrade Taoraemon and Prince Nerd's Soul first (Nick Note: Chichikaka and Leeku have Gene Sims at lvl. 10)
# For minions, also increase minion number cap

<span style="color:#0000FF">Avatar can also make you stronger:</span>
# Apostle Avatar: increases exploration stats
# Civil Mirage Avatar: increases earnings at Home
# Special Event Avatar: increases Research SPD
# All Avatar stats work permanently once you obtain them

<span style="color:#0000FF">Join a club and participate in wars:</span>
# Join a club and build a portal ASAP
# Get a large number of Research Manuals from Club Shop
# Get tons of resources from Card Shop and Traitor Shop
# Complete multi-snail incidents to get more cards
# Use Silver Tokens to defeat high-level legions and get currencies
# Buy Random Species Sequence first in Traitor Shop
# Complete Biozilla to buy Gene Essence from Biozilla Shop

<span style="color:#0000FF">How to increase Leadership:</span>
# Prioritize Gene Research, such as Zombie Form T4
# Collect Relics that increase Leadership, such as the [[Trojan Horse]]
# Consume a certain number of [[Consumables|Orange Fungi]]
# Right-side Relic Talents can boost Leadership
# Upgrade Minion Gear after clearing the Murikan Domain

<span style="color:#0000FF">Enhance your troop:</span>
# Upgrade form tier to unlock stronger minions
# Increase Leadership to deploy minions in battle
# Repair the [[Rocket]] and build rocket devices to increase minion stats
# Organize minions into 10-minion groups to gain stats bonuses
# Collect and Upgrade Relics that buff your minions

===More Resources===
<span style="color:#0000FF">Here are some regular weekly events:</span>
# The new server event is a good time to try your luck in the Lottery, but remember to keep some Offering Speedups
# Hoard specific resources for specific weekly events
# Weekly event rotation: Lottery-Wish-Offering<br>
<span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(Newer servers that have not entered the weekly event rotation will have hoarding events instead, which could last as long as 6 days)</span>

<span style="color:#0000FF">Hoard the items for weekly events</span>
# Lottery Week: Lottery Tickets, various Scrolls, W-tads (Nick Note: 15 Novice, 10 Expert, 5 Master or Grandmaster)
# Wishmaking Week: Wish Coins, Relic Frags, Taichi Fishes
# Offering Week: Offering Speedups, Divine Chests, and Dragon Chests (Nick Note: 5 of each Divine Chests, 1 Dragon Chest)

<span style="color:#0000FF">Lottery Tickets you can get without paying:</span>
# Get 1 by defeating a daily Hitman
# Get 1 every 3 days in Arena Shop
# Get 1-6 every Sunday by signing in
# Get a few to dozens in weekly events. Depends on your ability
# Get 3 every day from Daily Pack during Lottery Weeks
# From chat; the number depends on your luck
# From [[Fissure|Fissure Merchant]], refreshed every 3 days

<span style="color:#0000FF">W-tads you can get without paying</span>
# Get at least 100 W-tads by defeating a daily Hitman
# Get at least 160 per day from Daily Tasks
# Get 30-180 every Friday by signing in
# Get 19 every day from Weekly Event Packs
# Get at least 120 every 3 days after completing certain [[Fissure|Fissure Incidents]]
# Get lucky in the Tadpole Pond
# Get lucky in the Orange lottery slot
# Get lucky in chat
# Get interest from the Fortune Cat (Nick Note: Only if you invest W-tads)
# Get from Official mail; maintenance makes you rich!

<span style="color:#0000FF">Items you should buy from the shops:</span>
# [[Vending Machine]]: Lottery Ticket, Wish Coin, Offering Speedup
# Club: Research Manual, Organ
# Snail Arena: Pickaxe, Glue, Lottery Ticket
# Museum: Travel Speedup, Wish Coin
# [[Fissure|Fissure Merchant]]: Pack, Pickaxe, B-tads
# Biozilla Shop: Gene Essence
# Traitor Shop: Map, Random Sequence

<span style="color:#0000FF">Remember when the events are refreshed:</span><br>
Most events and tasks are refreshed at 06:30 PST<br>
Vending items are also refreshed at that time<br>
<span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(Monthly Pass and Unispark are refreshed at the same time)</span>

<span style="color:#0000FF">Be casual with the treasure resources:</span>
# Open Treasure Maps whenever you can
# Open Collector Scrolls whenever you can
# Open Memetic Catalysts whenever you can
# Open Treasures whenever you can, but save the Divine Chests for Offering Week

<span style="color:#0000FF">The longer you explore, the more you get!</span>
# To maximize rewards, explore a cleared map
# You can get extra Gear Chests from Murika and cells from Bharata
# Always choose the Time Rift if available
# Increase Movement Speed to shorten exploration time<br>
<span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(Rewards from different Forms are affected by actual exploration time)</span>

===Purchase Guide===
<span style="color:#0000FF">Know your limits of your credit card!</span><br>
Super Snail is an idle game after all. You can also have fun without recharging. Time matters the most when you grind.

<span style="color:#0000FF">Recommended packs (in descending order):</span>
# VIP Gold Card, VIP Silver Card (both permanent)
# Limited packs of every system
# Daily Packs
# Festival and crossover event packs
# Monthly pack
# Weekly event packs (complete rounds of weekly event tasks)

<span style="color:#0000FF">Spend your W-tads on these first:</span>
# Fortune Cat a safe bet
# Art of Trading, buy it as soon as your Power is enough
# Power Offer Pack, increases Fungus cap
# Offer packs of other systems
# Lottery Ticket and Wish Coin in [[Vending Machine]] and [[Fissure|Fissure Merchant]]
# Purple or better Chores
# Museum promotion, increases the earnings of museums with S rating

===Combat Strategies===
<span style="color:#0000FF">Basic Knowledge about [[Gear]]</span>
# Craft more advanced [[Gear#Realm|Realm Gear]] to defeat Apostles easily
# Get Iron Track first for auto-play
# Recommended [[Gear #Form_Gear|Form Gear]] in the early period: The Buried
# awaiting patch

<span style="color:#0000FF">[[Gear#Instrument|Weapon Gear]] Leaderboard(according to final forms):</span>
# Norris-chuck, Oldman Wand, The Big Bounce, Power Spinach
# District 9, Cretaceous Weapon, Hydra Gloves, Million Volts
# W-tad Sword, Know-It-All Device, Strength Master's Sword

<span style="color:#0000FF">[[Gear#Armor|Armor Gear]] Leaderboard (according to the final forms):</span>
# Ring of Paralysis, Traveler Outfit, Grandpire's Robe
# Fortress, Dracula Cape, Eye of Agamatto
# Agamemnon Outfit, The Great Magician, Super Warrior

<span style="color:#0000FF">Once enemy weakness is identified, proc RUSH:</span>
# Tap on bubble above target to check weakness
# Once RUSH procs, deal RUSH DMG each round
# RUSH also procs CRIT and ELMT DMG

<span style="color:#0000FF">About DEF:</span>
# Generally, DMG=ATK-DEF
# DEF also reduces RUSH DMG
# ELMT DMG ignores DEF but not ELMT RES

<span style="color:#0000FF">About CRIT:</span>
# CRIT deals 150% DMG of normal attacks
# CRIT DMG increases DMG done by CRITs
# CRIT DMG REDUC lowers CRIT DMG takes

<span style="color:#0000FF">Other Effects:</span>
# Lifesteal restores HP when dealing ATK DMG and CRIT DMG, but not ELMT DMG
# Dodge prevents you from taking any DMG
# ELMT DMG adds DMG to normal ATK and RUSH
# Paralyzed enemies cannot move for a round

<span style="color:#0000FF">About Minions:</span>
# Troop Battle applies the same rules as that of a Snail Battle
# Leadership decides the number of minions you can deploy
# The minions you deploy decide the stats of your troop
# Minions may get wounded after battles
# Wounded minions cannot be sent to anything
# You can treat wounded minions to dispel the injury status
# The number of wounded minions is decided by their lost HP and the casualty rate
# Minions with low Power will take the HP loss first
<span style="color:#8c8c8c ">(Puppet minions can take damage for minions of the same tier)</span>

<span style="color:#0000FF">About Casualty Rate:</span>
# In Troop battles, (DMG taken) x (casualty rate)=(Lost HP)
# When your troop takes damage, minions with low Power will lose HP first
# When HP - lost HP =0, the minions will become wounded
# The casualty rates in different Domains can be reduced by increasing the ratings of their corresponding Museums
# The casualty rate in Species War can be reduced through Card Exchange
# The casualty rates in different Domains, Species Wars, and Species Histories are different; always check when you edit your troops

<span style="color:#0000FF">About Upgrading Minions:</span>
# Zombie minions have relatively high HP and ATK
# Demon minions have relatively high ATK and RUSH
# Angel minions have relatively high HP and RUSH
# Mutant minions have relatively high ATK and RUSH
# Mecha minions have extremely high RUSH
# Dragon minions have comprehensively high stats
# All minions except Dragon ones can be converted into each other by spending W-Tadpoles in Minion Conversion Event

<span style="color:#0000FF">Outstanding Minions:</span>
# Early Period: Ironball Thrower, Chika, Imp
# Later Period: Frost Drake, Nanosaur
# Support: Wood Golem

===Special Strategies===
<span style="color:#0000FF">The [[Minigames|mini games]] in the computer grant a lot of rewards:</span>
# Free Cell: B-tads
# Byecube: W-tads
# It Takes 5: W-tads
# Tetromino Special: Travel Speedup
# 2048: Travel Speedup
# Civilization Boom: W-tads
# Explosive Cube: Gene Speedup

<span style="color:#0000FF">Wanna get lucky? Use both science and superstition!</span>
# Worship the Buddha in the Shrine before drawing
# Offer Soul of Developer at the Altar before drawing
# Take a good single draw before going for 10 draws
# Threaten your phone before drawing
# These methods have been proven useless

<span style="color:#0000FF">Share your tips in the notes!</span><br>
You are always welcome to leave a comment to talk about tips for Super Snail. Valuable comments will be shared!

[[Category:Home Base]]
